passage: The vaccine efficacy was 92% against severe disease (WHO, 2023).
source_excerpt: Vaccine efficacy against severe disease was 92% (95% CI 88-95) in the primary analysis.

sourceQuotes: Vaccine efficacy against severe disease was 92%

passage: Screen time doubled during the pandemic (Brown, 2022).
source_excerpt: Mean daily screen time increased by 20% compared with pre-pandemic baseline.

passage: CRISPR editing cured the disorder in all patients (Kim, 2024).
source_excerpt: In a cohort of 12, 3 participants showed partial response at 6 months.

rationale: Excerpt reports partial response in 3 of 12, not cure in all

passage: Urban green space improves mental health outcomes (Park, 2021).

passage: Sample size was n=500 with 80% power (Torres, 2020).
